why: Arrangements regarding municipal duty/tax payers (عوارض)
title_fa: وضع تمهيداتي در خصوص موديان عوارض شهرداري

why: Adds exit-fee (departure tax) clauses to existing law

title_fa: اعتبار طرحهاي عمراني  سرمايه گذاري ثابت  در سال 2537

why: Amends a substantive budget-note (tabsareh) of the 1372 national budget law
title_fa: قانون اصلاح تبصره 3 قانون بودجه سال 1372 كل كشور

why: 1962 decree converting all state-owned factories to joint-stock company form — an early corporatization/privatization-adjacent instrument affecting state industrial sector organization.
title_fa: تصويب نامه راجع به اداره كليه كارخانه هاي دولتي بصورت شركت سهامي

why: 1980 law on withdrawing a percentage of highway toll revenue collections — a fiscal instrument on toll revenue.
title_fa: لايحه قانوني برداشت درصدي از وصول عوارض اتوبانها

why: 1967 bylaw setting toll/duty collection from motor vehicles on the Tehran-Karaj highway — a real tariff/fee instrument.
title_fa: آئين نامه وصول عوارض از وسائل نقليه موتو ... انون شاهراه تهران - كرج مصوب 31 تير 1344

why: 1978 law on natural gas sale/purchase contract between Iran and Metalimex (Czechoslovakia) — an export/trade instrument affecting gas trade volumes.
title_fa: قانون مربوط بقرارداد فروش و خريد گاز طبي ... يران وشركت متاليمكس   METALIMEX چكسلواكي

why: 2025 bylaw allocating pre-sold petrochemical company products to downstream units along the value chain — a real supply/allocation instrument for petrochemical industry.
title_fa: آيين نامه اجرايي جزء  7  بند  د  ماده  4 ... ا واحدهاي پايين دستي در طول زنجيره ارزش

why: 1991 amendment to Article 20 of Iran's Electricity Law — likely touches electricity tariff/pricing provisions.
title_fa: قانون اصلاح ماده 20 اصلاحي قانون برق ايران مصوب 1362 5 20 مجلس شوراي اسلامي

why: 1983 amendment to Article 20 of Iran's Electricity Law (1967) — likely touches electricity tariff/pricing provisions.
title_fa: قانون اصلاح ماده 20 قانون برق ايران مصوب سال 1346

why: Annual national budget law (1360) sets government spending/revenue allocations for the year.
title_fa: قانون بودجه سال 1360 مجلس شوراي اسلامي

why: Securities listing directive for Tehran Stock Exchange governs capital-market access, affecting equity market activity.
title_fa: دستورالعمل پذيرش اوراق بهادار در بورس اوراق بهادار تهران

why: Law on use of a 15 billion rial government loan drawn from the Central Bank directly affects money supply/government financing.

why: Sets installment payment terms for sale/transfer of leased agricultural land to tenant farmers, an instrument affecting land tenure and agricultural output.
title_fa: قانون نحوه پرداخت وجوه قبوض اقساطي مالكا ... م و فروش املاك مورد اجاره بزارعين مستأجر

why: Governs settlement of overdue debts owed to the Agriculture/Rural Development Ministry, affecting agricultural credit and rural investment.
title_fa: قانون رسیدگی به پرونده‌های اشخاصی که به وزارت کشاورزی و عمران روستایی یا موسسات تابعه آن وزارتخانه بدهی معوقه دارند با اصلاحات و الحاقات بعدی

why: Establishes rules for housing loans to veterans/martyrs' families, a targeted credit/subsidy instrument affecting housing finance.

why: Debt-relief/installment law for late-payment penalties on land rental debts, a narrower fiscal relief instrument.
